required: external material depth remains outside the opening

batchEvidence.purpose: Correct classification where a tagged hidden v1 root coexists with an untagged visible Phase 2 candidate. The page is unmanaged-conflict until the visible candidate is audited or rebuilt.

Read-only root metadata refresh confirmed node 184:2 and its 11-layer visible structure are unchanged. Rebuilt portable source contracts make the historical root managed-stale until a future authorized Figma migration.
